en.hero_line: Every demanding application starts with the right material.
en.hero_para: For over 20 years, ETIA has helped manufacturers solve complex identification challenges through specialty materials, application expertise, and flexible supply.
why: We Understand the Application
We evaluate the process, environment, and performance requirements before recommending a material.
We Know Specialty Materials
We combine deep material expertise with a global portfolio of high-performance label materials.
We Supply with Flexibility
We support multiple materials, varied specifications, small batches, and dependable repeat supply.
We Customize a Solution
We provide testing, inspection, slitting, die-cutting, and converting tailored to the application.
en.appc_sub: Explore label materials selected for specific industries, processes, surfaces, temperatures, and identification challenges.

focus.name: Electronics Manufacturing & PCB
focus.headline: High-Temperature Polyimide PCB Labels
focus.desc: High-temperature labels for PCB manufacturing and electronics traceability.

focus.name: Metals & Ceramics
focus.headline: Ultra-High-Temperature Direct-Apply Labels
focus.desc: Reliable identification for extreme heat and manufacturing processes.

focus.name: Medical & Laboratory
focus.headline: Cryogenic and Chemical-Resistant Identification
focus.desc: Cryogenic and chemical-resistant labels for healthcare and laboratories.

focus.name: Automotive & Tire
focus.headline: Durable Identification for Automotive and Rubber Processing
focus.desc: Durable labels for automotive manufacturing and tire traceability.

focus.name: Wire & Cable
focus.headline: Durable Wire and Cable Identification
focus.desc: Long-lasting identification for wire, cable, and harness applications.

focus.name: Outdoor & Energy
focus.headline: Weather-Resistant Outdoor Identification
focus.desc: Weather-resistant labels for outdoor equipment and energy infrastructure.

en.fcta_para: We can label for you. Tell us your surface, process, environment and identification requirements — we'll match the material and arrange samples.
en.meta_title: ETIA Label — Specialty & Ultra-High-Temperature Industrial Labels
en.meta_desc: Durable, specialty label materials matched to your application — from cryogenic and high-heat to chemical, tamper-evident and PCB identification.

svc.title: 100% Quality Inspection
svc.desc: Backed by in-house laboratory testing, production verification, final inspection, and retained samples for full traceability.

svc.title: Application-Driven Solutions
svc.desc: Materials selected around your process, environment, and performance requirements.

svc.title: Flexible Supply
svc.desc: Multiple materials, varied specifications, sample quantities, and small-batch production.

svc.title: Responsive Application Support
svc.desc: When production conditions change or application issues arise, our engineers respond quickly to help keep your production running.

en.prod_sub: Tell us your application — we'll recommend a material and arrange samples for evaluation.
en.fs_sub: Request free samples of any material above — leave your email, phone and mailing address, and we'll send them for evaluation.
en.fs_note: We reply within one business day.

zh.hero_eyebrow: 耐久标识 · 特种标签材料
zh.hero_line: 每一种严苛应用，都始于选对材料。
zh.hero_para: 二十多年来，ETIA 依托特种材料、应用经验与柔性供应能力，帮助制造企业解决复杂的标识难题。
why: 我们理解应用
在推荐材料之前，综合评估工艺、环境与性能要求。
我们深耕特种材料
凭借长期材料经验，整合全球高性能特种标签材料。
我们灵活供应
支持多种材料、多种规格、小批量及长期稳定供货。
我们定制解决方案
围绕实际应用提供测试、检验、分切、模切及定制加工。
zh.appc_title: 面向严苛应用的精选材料
zh.appc_sub: 根据具体行业、工艺、表面、温度及标识要求，探索适合的标签材料与解决方案。

focus.name: 电子制造与 PCB
focus.headline: 耐高温聚酰亚胺 PCB 标签
focus.desc: 用于 PCB 制造与电子产品追溯的耐高温标签。

focus.name: 金属与陶瓷
focus.headline: 超高温直贴标签
focus.desc: 面向超高温制造过程的可靠标识。

focus.name: 医疗与实验室
focus.headline: 深低温与耐化学标识
focus.desc: 深低温与耐化学医疗实验室标识。

focus.name: 汽车与轮胎
focus.headline: 汽车与橡胶加工耐久标识
focus.desc: 汽车制造与轮胎追溯耐久标签。

focus.name: 电线与电缆
focus.headline: 耐久电线电缆标识
focus.desc: 电线、电缆及线束耐久标识。

focus.name: 户外与能源
focus.headline: 户外耐候标识
focus.desc: 面向户外设备与能源设施的耐候标签。

zh.fcta_para: 贴标的事，交给我们。告诉我们表面、工艺、环境与标识需求，我们为您匹配材料并安排样品。
zh.meta_title: ETIA Label — 特种与超高温工业标签
zh.meta_desc: 面向严苛环境的特种耐久标签材料，依应用匹配 —— 覆盖超低温、高温、化学、防篡改与 PCB 标识。

svc.title: 100% 质量检测
svc.desc: 自有实验室检测、上机验证、成品检验与严格留样，全流程质量可追溯。

svc.title: 应用驱动方案
svc.desc: 围绕工艺、环境与性能要求，为您的应用匹配合适材料。

svc.title: 柔性供应
svc.desc: 支持多种材料、多种规格、样品及小批量生产。

svc.title: 及时应用支持
svc.desc: 当生产工况变化或贴标应用出现问题时，我们及时响应，协助恢复稳定生产。

zh.prod_sub: 告诉我们您的应用，我们将推荐材料并安排样品验证。

products.name: 聚酰亚胺 PCB 标签 · APEX 新一代
双层抗静电 PCB 标签

zh.fs_sub: 上述任一材料均可免费申请样品——留下您的邮箱、电话与邮寄地址，我们为您寄送验证。
zh.fs_note: 我们将在一个工作日内回复。

vi.hero_eyebrow: NHẬN DIỆN BỀN VỮNG · VẬT LIỆU NHÃN CHUYÊN DỤNG
vi.hero_h1: Nơi vật liệu đáp ứng đúng ứng dụng.
vi.hero_line: Mỗi nhãn bền vững đều bắt đầu từ việc hiểu rõ ứng dụng.
vi.hero_para: Trong hơn 20 năm, ETIA đã hỗ trợ các nhà sản xuất giải quyết những yêu cầu nhận diện khắt khe bằng chuyên môn về vật liệu chuyên dụng và kinh nghiệm ứng dụng.
vi.why_head: Được xây dựng xoay quanh ứng dụng của bạn.
why: We Understand the Application
We evaluate the process, environment, and performance requirements before recommending a material.
We Know Specialty Materials
We combine deep material expertise with a global portfolio of high-performance label materials.
We Supply with Flexibility
We support multiple materials, varied specifications, small batches, and dependable repeat supply.
We Customize a Solution
We provide testing, inspection, slitting, die-cutting, and converting tailored to the application.
vi.appc_sub: Khám phá vật liệu nhãn bền vững được lựa chọn theo từng quy trình, môi trường và yêu cầu nhận diện cụ thể.

th.hero_eyebrow: ระบบระบุข้อมูลที่ทนทาน · วัสดุฉลากเฉพาะทาง
th.hero_h1: จุดที่วัสดุตอบโจทย์การใช้งานจริง
th.hero_line: ฉลากที่ทนทานทุกชนิดเริ่มต้นจากการเข้าใจการใช้งาน
th.hero_para: ตลอดระยะเวลากว่า 20 ปี ETIA ช่วยผู้ผลิตแก้ปัญหาด้านการระบุข้อมูลในสภาวะที่มีความต้องการสูง ด้วยความเชี่ยวชาญด้านวัสดุเฉพาะทางและความเข้าใจในการใช้งานจริง
th.hero_b1: ค้นหาการใช้งานของคุณ
th.hero_b2: ขอตัวอย่าง
th.why_eyebrow: ทำไมต้องเลือก ETIA
th.why_head: ออกแบบแนวทางโดยยึดการใช้งานของคุณเป็นหลัก
why: We Understand the Application
We evaluate the process, environment, and performance requirements before recommending a material.
We Know Specialty Materials
We combine deep material expertise with a global portfolio of high-performance label materials.
We Supply with Flexibility
We support multiple materials, varied specifications, small batches, and dependable repeat supply.
We Customize a Solution
We provide testing, inspection, slitting, die-cutting, and converting tailored to the application.
th.appc_eyebrow: ศูนย์รวมการใช้งาน
th.appc_title: ค้นหาการใช้งานของคุณ
th.appc_sub: สำรวจวัสดุฉลากที่ทนทานซึ่งคัดเลือกตามกระบวนการ สภาพแวดล้อม และข้อกำหนดด้านการระบุข้อมูลแต่ละประเภท
th.appc_viewall: ดูการใช้งานทั้งหมด
